name: Actoz Soft Co.,Ltd.
summary: Actoz Soft Co.,Ltd. operates as a game company in South Korea and internationally. It develops and sells PC online and mobile games, as well as engages in the e-sports and intellectual property franchising businesses. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Seoul, South Korea. Actoz Soft Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shanda Games Limited.
